title: Monday research
excerpt: I love monday.com and getting deep onto it.  but id like to hear your thoughts. what are the best features 1-5 that you all out there use, recommend etc.  id just like to see out there what you guys really like.

posts.author: Lingham (Lee Ingham)
posts.cookedHtml: I love monday.com and getting deep onto it. but id like to hear your thoughts. what are the best features 1-5 that you all out there use, recommend etc. id just like to see out there what you guys really like.

posts.author: John_S (John Gottschalk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think this post probably doesn’t belong in this section.

Anyways what I’m using a lot are:

  • List, Timeline & Workload views
  • Boards & Dashboards
  • Link Item & Mirror columns, as well as status + timeline/deadlines

We have a personal setup as well where we link a projects task board to a project top-level board (rather than sub-items) (the setup is similar to having epics and stories on separate boards), and then connecting the top-level boards into 1 Dashboard.
